subject: [RFC PATCH 45/45] mm: page_alloc: enlarge and unify spb_evacuate_for_order

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch addresses two issues in the slowpath of __alloc_pages_slowpath: a per-call budget that is too small and a source-pageblock migratetype filter that creates blind spots. The patch introduces new constants to increase the evacuation budget, removes the migratetype filter, and collapses the two-phase structure of spb_evacuate_for_order into a single pass. This allows for more efficient evacuation of movable pageblocks and reduces the likelihood of dropping ALLOC_NOFRAGMENT. The changes are intended to improve performance by allowing the slowpath to take advantage of available movable content in tainted SPBs.
